detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Tom._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Tom.sol#697-821):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Tom.sol#761)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Tom.sol#835-847)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Tom.sol#767)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Tom.sol#855)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Tom.sol#857)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Tom.sol#819)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Tom.sol#983)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Tom.sol#963)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Tom.sol#965)
	Tom._rOwned (Tom.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Tom._takeTeam(uint256) (Tom.sol#977-985)
	- Tom._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Tom.sol#937-973)
	- Tom.balanceOf(address) (Tom.sol#523-527)
	- Tom.constructor() (Tom.sol#431-487)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Tom.sol#819)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Tom.sol#991)
	Tom._rTotal (Tom.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Tom._getCurrentSupply() (Tom.sol#1141-1153)
	- Tom._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Tom.sol#989-995)
	- Tom.constructor() (Tom.sol#431-487)
	- Tom.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Tom.sol#619-641)
